chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3894 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case. 16-04-2025 Mr. Ch. Abu Bakar Khalil, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner would be satisfied if the application available at page-27 be determined by the respondent No.1. Learned A.A.G has no cavil to the aforesaid. Petition is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
